svg.text: Content-addressed immutable ordered index: API facade, mutation pipelines, deterministic chunking, Merkle node graph, storage backends
load root CID -> binary search keys
new root CID + shared old subtrees
keys: first keys of child spans
Invariant: keys are sorted byte strings; child key is the first key in that child span.
multiple roots can share storage and reconcile by CID-aware diff/merge
Primary flow: public API chooses a read/write/diff path, loads nodes by CID, rewrites changed content, stores deterministic bytes, and returns a new root.
